actions.description: Fourteenth board meeting. Platform stable — 8 consecutive clean QA cycles, zero bugs. Pac-Man spec complete, ready to build. UX/UI loading states designed, ready to build. Two simultaneous builds flagged with sequencing recommendation. Naming violations at 15, CEO escalation recommended.

nextStep: Next meeting: check Pac-Man build progress, UX/UI loading states implementation, naming violation resolution.
